---
title: "Merge_linear_models_results_chunks_mae"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-10"
params:
  merged_chunks: 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results'
  merged_mae_results: 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results'
---

```{r}
print(params)
```

Read merged chunks and adjust p.value
```{r}
merged_chunks <- read.csv(params$merged_chunks)
merged_chunks$X <- NULL
merged_chunks$p.adj <- p.adjust(merged_chunks$p.value, method = 'BH')
merged_chunks$Assay <- 'EMseq | 100,000 most variable CpG sites'
merged_chunks$Feature_plot <- merged_chunks$feature
```

```{r}
mixed_model_mae_results <- read.csv(params$merged_mae_results, row.names = 1)
```

```{r}
mixed_models_combined <- rbind(mixed_model_mae_results, merged_chunks)
write.csv(mixed_models_combined, 'MixedModels_combined.csv')
```
